design_principles: Data isolation: Each table holds all its info; no bleeding across tables.
If you can sit at a table, you can collaborate.
Native macOS fluid animations and glassmorphic surfaces.

typography.font_family: SF Pro Display, SF Pro Text, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif

title_bar.components: Traffic lights (close/min/max) left aligned with gap-2, centered title font-semibold, right nav/actions.

sidebar.sections: Home, Portal, Calendar, Messages, Apps, Contacts + tables section (live/dormant states with indicators).

dock.styling: glassmorphism backdrop-blur-[30px], p-2 rounded-xl border border-white/20 dark:border-white/10
dock.tiles: 48px height/width rounded-lg, hover:scale-125 hover:-translate-y-4 transition-all spring, with unread badges.

round_table_visualization.concept: Circular wooden table, radial member seats, shared items on surface.
round_table_visualization.live_state: glow ring (table_live_glow), rotating members (ring_rotate), active avatars glow (avatar_active_glow).
round_table_visualization.dormant_state: desaturated colors, dashed border ring, no glowing animations.

portal_dashboard.grid: Bento-style grid. 6 Widgets: Today's Schedule, Recent on Tables, My Tables, Quick Actions, Invites & Referrals, Notifications.
portal_dashboard.styling: Cards with bg-secondary, rounded-lg, shadow-md, 1px border.

communications_hub.tabs: Email (inbox/sent/starred, compose, read, star), Texts (iMessage-style bubbles, thread sidebar), Chat (preview), Walkie (online members)
communications_hub.layout: Two-pane layout typical of macOS Mail/Messages (Left list 300px, Right detail).

calendar.layout: Monthly grid, color-coded events per table. Table context isolation applies.

app_launcher.layout: Grid of 24 apps, 4x6 or 6x4 depending on width. Icon + text below.

contacts.layout: Split view: on-platform vs not-on-platform contacts, with invite buttons.

invite_referral_system.components: Invite codes generator, share button, usage tracking list, Referral tracking with badge progression + top-3 leaderboard.

walkie_talkie.panel: Floating panel or sidebar section, select target, push-to-talk button (simulated).

video_call_overlay.styling: Floating glassmorphic modal overlay, PiP supported.

ping_notification.styling: Slide-in toast from top-right. Includes answer/dismiss actions.

onboarding_wizard.layout: Centered glassmorphic card on an abstract gradient background. Step indicators.

component_guidelines.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-[30px] bg-white/70 (light) or bg-black/60 (dark) for floating navs, modals, and dock. MUST include 1px delicate inner stroke.
component_guidelines.buttons: Rounded-md or rounded-lg, System Blue #007AFF for primary actions. Text color pure white.
component_guidelines.tooltips: Contextual help tooltips on first-time visit for every major section.
component_guidelines.empty_states: Meaningful illustrations/icons with CTAs for every view when no data is present.
component_guidelines.data_testids: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark/light mode surface colors and macOS system colors.
Implement the left sidebar (240px), top title bar (52px), and bottom dock with exact blur settings.
For the table view, enforce absolute data isolation. Users only see data (messages, calendar, files) scoped to the active table.
All interactive elements must use the exact macOS shadows and border radii.
Integrate the 9 requested animation keyframes (table-live-glow, ring-rotate, etc.) and apply them perfectly in the table component.
Build the Communications Hub with 4 explicit tabs (Email, Texts, Chat, Walkie). Simulate Walkie & Video Call functionality with realistic UI mockups.
Ensure 'Traffic Lights' in the title bar use the exact hex codes provided (#FF5F57, #FFBD2E, #28C840).
Persist dark/light mode toggle in localStorage.
Use Phosphor icons or Heroicons for App Launcher and Dock to keep a premium macOS aesthetic.
Include data-testid on all buttons, links, and forms for automated testing.
